Pomodoro Timer - The Best Free Online Focus Timer with Lo-fi Music, Radio & Screen Wake Lock (2026)

Use this free Pomodoro Timer to supercharge your productivity, study sessions, and deep work. This is the ultimate all-in-one study timer that combines the proven Pomodoro Technique with built-in lo-fi music, live radio streams, and focus-enhancing features. No account needed, no ads, no tracking, no cookies. 100% free and private. Works on desktop, laptop, tablet, and mobile.

What is the Pomodoro Technique?

The Pomodoro Technique is a time management method developed by Francesco Cirillo in the late 1980s. Named after the Italian word for "tomato" (after the tomato-shaped kitchen timer Cirillo used as a university student), it breaks work into focused intervals called "pomodoros" — traditionally 25-30 minutes — separated by short breaks. After four pomodoros, you take a longer break. This science-backed technique helps maintain focus, reduce mental fatigue, prevent burnout, and dramatically improve productivity for studying, coding, writing, research, and any knowledge work.

Why This is the Best Pomodoro Timer

Unlike basic countdown timers, this Pomodoro Timer is a complete focus environment with 2000+ lo-fi songs, 20+ radio stations, screen wake lock, customizable alarms, and a beautiful dark aesthetic. It's a single HTML file with zero dependencies — no server, no database, no tracking. Everything runs in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.

Complete Feature List

  • Customizable Timer Intervals: Quick presets (5, 15, 30, 45, 60, 90, 120 minutes) plus custom time input (type any duration like "42" or "1:30")
  • Auto Mix Music Player: 2000+ lo-fi, chillhop, jazz, and ambient songs from YouTube, endlessly shuffled using Fisher-Yates algorithm with no repeats until all songs are played
  • YouTube Live Radio: Lofi Girl, Chillhop Music, Cafe Music BGM, Cafe BGM — live 24/7 streams for studying
  • All India Radio (Akashvani / Prasar Bharati): Vividh Bharati, Raagam (classical), Akashvani Aaradhana, FM Gold (Hindi), Akashvani Bangla (Bengali), AIR News 24x7, News on AIR
  • BBC Radio: BBC Radio 1 (pop/dance), Radio 2 (pop/rock), Radio 3 (classical), Radio 4 (talk/drama), World Service (news), Asian Network (South Asian music)
  • SomaFM Groove Salad: Ambient/chill electronic music — perfect for coding and deep focus
  • SoundCloud Integration: Built-in SoundCloud player widget
  • Custom URL Support: Paste any YouTube or SoundCloud URL for your own music
  • Self-Healing Radio: Automatic fallback via Radio Browser API when streams go down — the app finds working alternative URLs automatically and caches them for future sessions
  • Screen Wake Lock (No Sleep Mode): Prevents your screen from turning off during study sessions using NoSleep.js technology. Optional timed wake lock (1-24 hours)
  • Customizable Alarm Sounds: Choose between Beep 15s (short alert), Beep 30s (default, increasing frequency), or "The Time Is Now" (John Cena entrance theme, 88 seconds)
  • Adjustable Alarm Volume: Volume amplification from 1x to 7x using Web Audio API GainNode — both alarm sounds normalized to equal perceived loudness
  • Browser Notifications: Cross-tab notifications so you see the alarm even when on a different tab or window
  • Keyboard Shortcuts: Space (start/pause), R (reset). Any activity (key press, click, tap, scroll, app switch) dismisses alarm
  • Media Session API: Dismiss alarm with hardware media keys and phone lock/power button
  • Session Tracking: Tracks completed pomodoro sessions with persistent counter
  • Dark Aesthetic Theme: Beautiful purple gradient dark theme that's easy on the eyes for long study sessions
  • Responsive Design: Works perfectly on all screen sizes — desktop, laptop, tablet, and mobile phones
  • Web Worker Timer: Timestamp-based timer using Web Worker for accurate countdown even when the browser tab is in the background
  • Zero Privacy Concerns: No cookies, no analytics, no tracking, no fingerprinting. All data stored in browser localStorage only
  • No Account Required: Start using immediately — no sign-up, no login, no email required

Who Is This Timer For?

  • Students: Perfect for exam preparation, homework, thesis writing, SAT/GRE/GMAT/UPSC/JEE/NEET study sessions
  • Developers & Programmers: Ideal for coding sprints, debugging sessions, and focused programming with lo-fi background music
  • Writers & Content Creators: Great for writing sprints, blog posts, essays, and creative work
  • Remote Workers: Essential for work-from-home (WFH) productivity and time management
  • Researchers & Academics: Useful for reading papers, literature reviews, and research work
  • Anyone seeking focus: Whether you have ADHD, struggle with procrastination, or just want to be more productive

Supported Platforms

This Pomodoro Timer works in all modern web browsers: Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Apple Safari, Microsoft Edge, Opera, Brave, Vivaldi, Samsung Internet, and more. Works on Windows, macOS, Linux, ChromeOS, iOS (iPhone, iPad), and Android devices.

How to Use This Pomodoro Timer

  1. Choose a timer duration: select a preset (5m, 15m, 30m, 45m, 1h, 90m, 2h) or enter a custom time
  2. Select your background music: Auto Mix (2000+ lo-fi songs), YouTube Live radio, All India Radio, BBC Radio, SomaFM, SoundCloud, or paste a custom URL
  3. Configure your alarm: choose the sound (Beep 15s, Beep 30s, or John Cena theme) and volume level (1x-7x)
  4. Enable Screen Wake Lock to keep your display on
  5. Press Start (or press Space) and focus on your work
  6. When the alarm sounds, take a short break (5 minutes)
  7. After 4 pomodoros, take a longer break (15-30 minutes)
  8. Track your completed sessions and build your productivity streak

YouTube Content: All YouTube videos are embedded exclusively via the official YouTube IFrame Player API (developers.google.com/youtube). Embedding is performed only when the video owner has explicitly enabled iframe embedding for their content via YouTube's settings. No video is downloaded, cached, stored, modified, re-encoded, or redistributed. All playback occurs within YouTube's own embedded player, subject to YouTube's Terms of Service. The owner does not circumvent, override, or bypass any access controls, DRM, geographic restrictions, or embedding restrictions set by content owners. YouTube's own terms and the content owner's settings govern all embedded video playback.

Radio Streams: All radio streams (All India Radio / Akashvani / Prasar Bharati, BBC, SomaFM, etc.) are accessed via publicly available HLS (HTTP Live Streaming) endpoints provided by the broadcasters themselves for public consumption. Fallback station URLs are discovered via the open-source Radio Browser API (radio-browser.info), a community-maintained directory of publicly available radio streams. No radio content is recorded, stored, cached, downloaded, redistributed, or re-broadcast. All streams play directly from the broadcaster's servers in real-time. The owner acts solely as a passive conduit and does not select, curate, modify, or editorially control any radio content.

SoundCloud Content: SoundCloud content is embedded via SoundCloud's official public embed widget. All playback is governed by SoundCloud's Terms of Use. No audio is downloaded, stored, or redistributed.
